description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style rolling toolbox with a rectangular form, primarily constructed from metal and featuring a distressed red finish on its frame and drawers. The top surface is bordered by a thick, gray metallic rim and includes several shallow, open compartments for organizing small tools or parts, as well as a central recessed work area. The front face displays five horizontal drawers of varying heights, all with visible handles, and the topmost drawer is partially open, revealing internal dividers. The sides are covered with a perforated metal panel, likely for ventilation or tool hanging, and one side shows a side handle for maneuvering the toolbox. Four caster wheels at the base provide mobility, making it suitable for workshops, garages, or urban maintenance settings. The overall design emphasizes durability, functionality, and ease of access to tools and supplies.
description: A heavy-duty, red metal rolling toolbox with multiple drawers, open top compartments, and caster wheels for mobility. It features a rugged, industrial look with a mix of open and closed storage spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the perforated metal panel, side handle, and partially open top drawer with internal dividers.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full perforated metal panel and the top's open compartments, with no drawers visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with another perforated panel, visible side handle, and the top's compartment layout.
description_view_3: Front view displaying five red drawers, the topmost one open with dividers, and the full set of caster wheels.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed tubular metal side handle, cylindrical in shape, likely steel with a black rubberized grip for ergonomic handling.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No visible external latch or locking mechanism; drawers appear to be friction-fit or use internal slides.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Five front-facing drawers of varying heights, one of which is open and divided into smaller sections; top surface has three shallow open bins and a central recessed tray; all compartments appear fixed.
